name: Corvus Bakery
self_description: As the only GF bakery in Nevada County, we are dedicated to offering you a creative twist on classic bakery favorites, in a facility that is 100% Gluten-Free.

name: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill
self_description: Our identity is synonymous with world-class live music, elevated bar food using organic ingredients, a full range of libations, sporting spirit and an overriding comfort factor that makes us a home away from home for many.

name: Deer Creek Bakehouse
self_description: Deer Creek Bakehouse, lead by Graeme Aycock, launched in 2021 from a tiny house on Deer Creek in Nevada City with dreams of sharing delicious, hand-crafted bread with the people.

name: Diego's Restaurant
self_description: Diego's celebrates hand-prepared latin inspired recipes from Chile up to California for over two decades. By operating with a culture of love, gratitude and a professional personal touch, we enjoy providing a colorful, eclectic and comfortable atmosphere.

name: Farmstead Cheeses and Wines
self_description: Farmstead Cheeses & Wines was founded in 2003 by Jeff Diamond and sold to Dave Chambers in April of 2023. Dave focuses on sustainable, family producers of fine wines and specializes in under the radar and hard-to-find boutique wines and artisan cheeses.

name: Friar Tucks Restaurant & Bar
self_description: Inside a landmark 1860 brick building, Friar Tuck's has been Nevada City's most beloved table since 1973, offering live music every night and a Wine Spectator award-winning cellar.

name: Gary's Place
self_description: Gary's Place is a lively cocktail bar in Grass Valley, CA, offering a full kitchen with fresh food, karaoke nights, and a pool table with a Main Street patio for outdoor seating.

name: Gold Miners Inn
self_description: Gold Miners Inn Grass Valley an Ascend Collection Hotel is a 2.5-star property located in Grass Valley, California, steps from Grass Valley Brewing and serving as a convenient base for exploring the region's mining heritage and cultural attractions.

name: Golden Era Lounge
self_description: Golden Era is host to a vibrant music scene with Jazz, Blues, R&B, Funk, World, and Soul as weekend entertainment offerings and single artists across multiple genres on weekdays.

name: Golden Gate Saloon
self_description: The Golden Gate is one of the longest operating barrooms west of the Mississippi River, serving classic and seasonal cocktails, regional and international wines, and a selection of beers with live music nights and local character.

name: Grass Valley Brewing Co.
self_description: Grass Valley Brewing Company came to life because of our passion for great beer and love of community. We believe great beer is produced when skill meets ingredients.

name: Grass Valley RV Resort
self_description: Tucked into the rolling hills of California's Sierra Nevada foothills, Grass Valley RV Resort is where the spirit of Gold Country meets modern comfort. We're not just a stop along the road — we're a destination where families, friends, and fellow travelers gather to celebrate life, adventure, and community.

name: Harmony Ridge Lodge
self_description: Harmony Ridge Lodge, nestled in the woods of the Tahoe National Forest 5 miles from Nevada City, is one of Nevada County's true gems. We specialize in Weddings, Retreats and Bed & Breakfast.

name: Holbrooke Hotel
self_description: We've been building character since 1852. Celebrating Grass Valley at its most authentic—unearthed, restored and brought forward into today. After serving the community for over 150 years, the Holbrooke Hotel is ready to spend some time with you.
